description: Composition Brown printed round neck kurta, made of cotton blend fabric, has a split neckline, short sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron vishudh's summer staple features an ethnic print in subtle shades on this pretty piece. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
